zh.Constantinople, Istanbul, Byzantine Empi: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Irene Doukaina於1066年出生在白展丁 艾皮爾時，她的父親Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II30歲，母親Maria of Bulgaria13歲。她於大約1080年與Alexios I Komnene在土耳其易斯坦波爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1133年2月19日在土耳其易斯坦波爾享年67歲。

zh-hans.Constantinople, Istanbul, Byzantine Empi: 土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Irene Doukaina于1066年出生在白展丁 艾皮爾时，她的父亲Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II30岁，母亲Maria of Bulgaria13岁。她于大约1080年与Alexios I Komnene在土耳其易斯坦波爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1133年2月19日在土耳其易斯坦波爾享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Irene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Greek eirēnē ‘peace’ it was borne in Greek mythology by a minor goddess who personified peace, and by a Byzantine empress ( 752–803 ). The name was taken up in the English-speaking world at the end of the 19th century, and became popular in the 20th, partly as a result of being used as the name of a character in John Galsworthy's The Forsyte Saga ( 1922 ). It was formerly pronounced in three syllables, as in Greek, but is now thoroughly naturalized as an English name and usually pronounced as two syllables.

en.lifeSummary: When Irene Doukaina was born in 1066, in Byzantine Empire, her father, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, was 30 and her mother, Maria of Bulgaria, was 13. She married Alexios I Komnene about 1080, in İstanbul, Türkiye. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 19 February 1133, in İstanbul, Türkiye, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Irene Doukaina est née en 1066, à Empire byzantin, son père, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Maria of Bulgaria, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Alexios I Komnene environ 1080, à İstanbul, Turquie. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 19 février 1133, à İstanbul, Turquie, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Irene Doukaina 1066 in Byzantinisches Reich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II 30 und ihre Mutter Maria of Bulgaria 13. Sie hat um 1080 in İstanbul, Türkei Alexios I Komnene geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 19. Februar 1133 im Alter von 67 Jahren in İstanbul, Türkei.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Irene Doukaina è nata il nel 1066 nel Impero bizantino, sua padre, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Maria of Bulgaria, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Alexios I Komnene circa 1080, nel İstanbul, Turchia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 19 febbraio 1133, nel İstanbul, Turchia, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.Constantinople, Istanbul, Byzantine Empi: トルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブル
ja.lifeSummary: Irene Doukainaが1066年に東ローマ帝国で生まれた時，父Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire IIは30歳，母Maria of Bulgariaは13歳であった。約1080年にトルコイスタンブルでAlexios I Komneneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1133年2月19日にトルコイスタンブルで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Irene Doukaina(이)가 1066년 비자틴 피르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria of Bulgaria(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 대략 1080년 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 Alexios I Komnene(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1133년 2월 19일 튀르키예 이스탠불에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Irene Doukaina nasceu em 1066, em Império Bizantino, seu pai, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Maria of Bulgaria, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexios I Komnene aproximadamente 1080, em İstanbul, Turquia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 19 de fevereiro de 1133, em İstanbul, Turquia, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Irene Doukaina родилась в 1066 г. в местности Византийская империя, её отцу по имени Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria of Bulgaria, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexios I Komnene около 1080 г. в местности истанбул, Турция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 19 февраля 1133 г. в местности истанбул, Турция в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Irene Doukaina nació en 1066, en Imperio bizantino, su papá, Grand Prince Michael Doukas of the Byzantine Empire II, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Maria of Bulgaria, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Alexios I Komnene aproximadamente 1080, en İstanbul, Turquía. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 19 de febrero de 1133, en İstanbul, Turquía, a la edad de 67 años.
